title: NyayaSetu Adaptive Legal Dataset
description: NyayaSetu + ZamanatAI + CivicDocs is a multilingual adaptive legal-access dataset for Indian civic and justice workflows. It includes a 2,573-row unified AutoScientist dataset, 122 matched live Twilio WhatsApp pipeline observations, benchmark/evaluation artifacts, WhatsApp-style legal aid queries, civic document workflows, language labels, legal intents, entities, output document types, feedback signals, correction events, adaptation history, and confidence-before/after metrics. Built for the Adaption Labs Adaptive Data Track.
